allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('hero:', !!j.hero, '| gallery count:', j.gallery?.length, '| lounge:', j.lounge?.length\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('hero:', bool\(d.get\('hero'\)\), '| gallery:', len\(d.get\('gallery',[]\)\), '| lounge:', len\(d.get\('lounge',[]\)\)\)")
